query:
UPDATE comms_queue
               SET
                   status = CASE
                       WHEN attempts + 1 >= max_attempts THEN 'failed'::comms_status
                       ELSE 'pending'::comms_status
                   END,
                   attempts = attempts + 1,
                   last_error = $2,
                   updated_at = NOW(),
                   scheduled_for = NOW() + (INTERVAL '1 minute' * (attempts + 1))
               WHERE id = $1
